title: Singin' in the Rain
description: A joyful song and dance number about a man walking and dancing through a downpour, splashing in puddles while utterly in love.

title: Purple Rain
description: A sweeping, emotional rock ballad with a man singing about love, loss and rain under a purple sky, building to a famous guitar solo.

title: Bohemian Rhapsody
description: An operatic rock epic shifting between ballad, opera and hard rock, telling a surreal story of a young man who has killed and faces judgment.

title: November Rain
description: A long power ballad about enduring love through hard times, with a man, rain imagery, orchestral strings and an extended guitar solo.

title: Set Fire to the Rain
description: A powerful breakup ballad where a woman sings about a turbulent love, with rain as a recurring metaphor for pain and release.

title: Billie Jean
description: A tense pop song with an iconic bassline about a man denying a woman's claim that he fathered her child.
